scope: full integration report and masked APDU trace-pack evidence plan

required_metadata.requirement: SHA-256 of the exact kernel binary used for the integration run
SHA-256 of the signed profile and configuration bundle under test
SHA-256 of the approved CAPK bundle under test
recognized lab, scheme, acquirer, or submission-owner test-tool package version
accepted lab or test-tool case identifier mapped to repository RTM rows
Level 3 or acquirer case identifier where the accepted test plan requires it
Level 3, acquirer, and public-bulletin reconciliation notes selected for the submitted scope
SHA-256 of the full masked APDU trace pack tied to case ordering and submitted build identity
expected cryptogram type, TVR/TSI, SW1/SW2, issuer-script result, and final outcome
observed cryptogram type, TVR/TSI, SW1/SW2, issuer-script result, and final outcome
accepted deviation, remediation, retest evidence, or rejection for every mismatch

requirements.authority: recognized laboratory, scheme, acquirer, or submission owner
requirements.required_attachment: test-plan scope statement naming L2, L3/acquirer, contact, contactless, and excluded case families
requirements.acceptance_gate: test scope must match the submitted kernel, device, profile, interface, and public/licensed bulletin reconciliation set

requirements.authority: recognized laboratory, scheme, or accepted submission owner
requirements.required_attachment: complete L2 execution report with pass/fail results, environment, tool version, and deviation list
requirements.acceptance_gate: every applicable L2 case must be executed or formally excluded with authority-approved rationale

requirements.authority: acquirer, processor, scheme, or Level 3 test authority
requirements.required_attachment: Level 3/acquirer bulletin reconciliation and host-message outcome report for the accepted test plan
requirements.acceptance_gate: L3/acquirer results must agree with host handoff data, authorization response handling, and final outcome traces

requirements.authority: recognized laboratory, scheme, acquirer, or accepted test-tool owner
requirements.required_attachment: full masked APDU trace pack for every applicable case in accepted execution order
requirements.acceptance_gate: trace pack must be replayable, masked, complete for the claimed cases, and bound to the submitted binary/profile identity

requirements.authority: laboratory, scheme, acquirer, or submission owner
requirements.required_attachment: case-level expected-versus-actual outcome matrix covering TVR, TSI, CID, SW1/SW2, issuer scripts, and final outcome
requirements.acceptance_gate: every mismatch must have a recorded disposition, remediation, retest, or accepted exclusion

requirements.authority: laboratory, scheme, acquirer, or submission owner
requirements.required_attachment: deviation register with owner, severity, remediation, retest evidence, residual-risk acceptance, and supersession history
requirements.acceptance_gate: no unresolved unacceptable deviation may remain before a certification-facing release is submitted

requirements.required_attachment: hash bundle tying integration report, trace pack, RTM, device evidence, profiles, CAPKs, and binary together
requirements.acceptance_gate: report hashes must agree with freeze-manifest hashes and the device/profile scope under submission
